reason: solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, and test_not_tautological are test-quality problems (overly specific string matching that validates syntax rather than behavior, self-contained simulations that pass regardless of file changes). behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage are irreconcilable for the f2p tests: test_allgather_size_guard_present requires literal strings 'tensor.size(0)' and 'inputTensors[0].size(0)' and '!='; no_solution_leakage prohibits describing the exact fix strategy. These constraints are mutually exclusive for the fail-to-pass text-matching tests. The instruction correctly describes the symptom and required fix direction; it cannot add the specific strings without leaking the solution.
